# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is a Quarto book of code accompanying our manuscript "A CD138+ tumor-associated macrophage-Siglec-F+ neutrophil feedforward loop promotes immune evasion in pancreatic cancer".

```{r echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("fs", "configr", "stringr", "ggpubr", "ggthemes", 
          "jhtools", "glue", "ggsci", "patchwork", "tidyverse", "dplyr", "Seurat", 
          "scDblFinder", "paletteer", "readxl", "writexl", "ComplexHeatmap", 
          "circlize", "data.table", "survminer", "survival")  
for (pkg in pkgs){
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg, character.only = T))
}
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
